reason: A teen romance spirals into obsessive control and heartbreak with no hero to save them.
A murderous couple’s violent bond leaves only ruin for those foolish enough to love them.
A steamy scheme turns monstrous when lies and lust collide in a deadly love triangle.
A comic-book artist’s affair reveals unfiltered pain in a raw, consuming obsession.
A brief fling ignites a profound longing, yet love’s aftermath brings only quiet despair.
An alcoholic screenwriter’s doomed romance plays out in shattered dreams and final toasts.
A wartime romance fractures under the weight of vengeance and impossible loyalty.
Intersecting lives and courtship blur into betrayal in a twisted tapestry of desire.
A teenager’s toxic liaisons flood entire families with sorrow and bitter regrets.
Fleeting passion turns suffocating when each kiss feels like a nail in the heart.
